title: Implement secret isolation and evidence redaction

environment.os: Windows local; GitHub Actions Ubuntu and Windows

commands.name: Missing secret isolation and redaction modules
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/secret-isolation.test.ts --project property tests/property/secret-isolation.property.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: Both suites failed to import the not-yet-implemented secret isolation module and zero tests ran

commands.name: Undefined secret-disclosure acceptance steps
commands.expectedFailure: The nine prior scenarios and 102 steps passed while two AUT-04 scenarios and ten steps were undefined

commands.name: Missing PostgreSQL repository and HTTP routes
commands.expectedFailure: The PostgreSQL suite could not construct a secret repository and the route suite failed to import missing endpoints

commands.name: Seeded redaction and context-bound lease properties
commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/secret-isolation.test.ts --project property tests/property/secret-isolation.property.test.ts

commands.name: Typed, linted, and adversarial secret-isolation slice
commands.command: pnpm lint && pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/secret-isolation.test.ts --project property tests/property/secret-isolation.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/secret-isolation.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/secret-isolation-routes.test.ts --project security tests/security/secret-isolation-corpus.test.ts

commands.name: Browser journey exposed nested inventory response handling
commands.expectedFailure: The new panel read software inventory items as flat values, producing undefined list keys, a framework overlay, and no selectable Northstar record

commands.name: Focused secret-disclosure and redaction browser journeys
Focused durable proof exposed metadata-view count and stale compiled export
commands.command: pnpm domain:evidence:check && pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/domain-evidence.test.ts tests/unit/secret-isolation.test.ts --project property tests/property/secret-isolation.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts tests/integration/secret-isolation.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/secret-isolation-routes.test.ts --project security tests/security/secret-isolation-corpus.test.ts
commands.expectedFailure: The schema inventory omitted the new safe metadata view and the route suite loaded the previous compiled package before its rebuild

commands.name: Migration, redaction, lease, API, and browser-context proof
commands.command: pnpm --filter @pactwire/core build && pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/domain-evidence.test.ts tests/unit/secret-isolation.test.ts --project property tests/property/secret-isolation.property.test.ts --project integration tests/integration/domain-migrations.test.ts tests/integration/secret-isolation.test.ts apps/web/tests/integration/secret-isolation-routes.test.ts --project security tests/security/secret-isolation-corpus.test.ts

commands.name: Full gate exposed cold-route timeout and outer shell cap
commands.expectedFailure: A cold development route exceeded Cucumber's 30-second step ceiling; the five-minute outer shell then terminated the formatter, producing downstream broken-pipe errors

commands.name: Complete local verification gate before production harness correction
Production capture exposed secure-cookie harness mismatch
commands.command: PACTWIRE_CAPTURE_CURATED_EVIDENCE=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_TASK=AUT-04 PACTWIRE_BDD_PRODUCTION=1 PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@AUT-04 pnpm --filter @pactwire/web build && pnpm test:bdd
commands.expectedFailure: The browser journey passed credential management and redaction but Playwright's out-of-page HTTP client omitted the production Secure session cookie from a local HTTP export request, returning 401; the step was moved to the same-origin browser path without weakening cookie security

commands.name: Production build and source-bound secret-isolation capture
commands.command: PACTWIRE_CAPTURE_CURATED_EVIDENCE=1 PACTWIRE_EVIDENCE_TASK=AUT-04 PACTWIRE_BDD_PRODUCTION=1 PACTWIRE_BDD_TAGS=@AUT-04 pnpm --filter @pactwire/web build && pnpm test:bdd

commands.name: Complete local verification after production browser export fix
Repository credential-pattern scan
commands.command: rg -n -P --hidden with token-boundary patterns and generated, dependency, lockfile, artifact, and image exclusions; no matches is success

commands.name: Clean-checkout verification on Ubuntu and Windows

scenarios.scenario: Untrusted page content cannot request a saved credential
Normal evidence and exports redact configured credential variants
Switching users clears metadata before the new permission check

assets.altText: Narrow credential-isolation panel showing a masked fictional value, metadata-only credential card, and a recorded raw-access denial.
assets.caption: The management page keeps the value masked, exposes only metadata, and gives a direct audited denial when a person asks for raw access.

assets.altText: Desktop credential-isolation panel showing the masked fictional value and a safe preview in which eight raw and encoded appearances were replaced.
assets.caption: The before side reports configured forms without returning their bytes; the after side shows the prompt, log, structured evidence, and export fields replaced with the fixed redaction marker.

proofs.description: Exact representation, structured-field, authenticated-encryption, and screenshot-mask examples
Seeded redaction idempotence and single-context, single-use harness lease properties
PostgreSQL ciphertext, output-channel redaction, lease expiry/isolation, raw denial, export, audit, and immutable-byte checks
Signed identity, metadata-only responses, forged-role denial, validation, raw denial, redaction, export, revocation, and cross-workspace checks
Forty-eight generated credential corpora and a real two-context Chromium isolation and masking check
Attempted untrusted-page disclosure plus normal evidence and export redaction journeys
Dynamic credentials, representation leak assertions, strict browser gate, masked screenshots, and export verification
Configured representations, structured sensitive-field replacement, idempotence, and screenshot mask selectors
AES-256-GCM service, metadata-only repository contract, short-lived harness leases, output redaction, and access audits
Workspace-bound encrypted records, lease hashes, metadata view, and database-enforced immutable bindings
Responsive direct-language credential management, denied access, and safe redaction preview interface
Defensive final export redaction across all workspace credential records
Curated AUT-04 red/green record, threat-boundary explanation, and explicit limitations

knownLimitations: AUT-04 isolates saved credentials and their context-bound leases; complete runner isolation for cookies, storage, downloads, and clipboard remains RUN-01.
The controlled browser fixture uses in-memory state while PostgreSQL encryption, immutability, and access audit behavior are verified independently.
The demo accepts only generated fictional values; it is not a credential vault for real production accounts.
